instructions.title: Organization-wide Instructions
instructions.description: Define instructions that are applied to all conversations of all users in your organization. Users do not see these instructions, but the AI assistant follows them in every chat.
instructions.label: Instructions
instructions.placeholder: e.g. All responses must comply with our communication guidelines. Always use formal language.

internetAccess.title: Internet access
internetAccess.description: Control whether the AI assistant can access the internet in chats. This applies to all users in your organization.
internetAccess.label: Disable internet access
internetAccess.hint: When enabled, the AI assistant can no longer use web search or read the contents of websites in any chat.
internetAccess.error: Failed to update internet access setting.
internetAccess.loadError: Failed to load internet access setting.
